title: Ping Mod
description: ping Display, for better customisable mod for ping!
body:
**A sleek and customizable ping display mod for Minecraft that shows your real-time connection quality with beautiful visuals and extensive customization options.**

Basic Controls
_O Key_: Open settings menu (configurable in Minecraft controls)

Drag Mode: Enable in Additional Settings to click and drag the display

Quick Setup
**Press O to open settings**

Choose your preferred Display Mode

Select a Position Preset

Toggle features like Background and Animations

Use Additional Settings for advanced options, **find it out ingame, go load it up**
